title: Star Wars Missions 16: Imperial Jailbreak
content:
{{Top|rwm|reb|italics=1}} {{Book |image=[[File:Missions16.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars Missions 16:
Imperial Jailbreak'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[December]] [[1998]]''[[Star Wars Missions 16: Imperial Jailbreak]]'' |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0590764136 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline=c. [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5]]–[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]]''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' and the next three ''Star Wars Missions'' books tell a continuous story that is set after the Evacuation of Yavin, during the construction of [[Echo Base/Legends|Echo Base]], thus placing the books between [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5]]–[[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]] per ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''. |series=''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Missions 17: Darth Vader's Return]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Missions 16: Imperial Jailbreak''''' is the sixteenth adventure book in the ''[[Star Wars Missions]]'' young-reader series and [[roleplaying game]]. It was published by [[Scholastic]] in [[December]] [[1998]]. ==Publisher's summary== ''A powerful weapon is being held at the Imperial prison on Merakai. You must retrieve it... or face severe punishment. The hitch? You must break ''into'' and then back ''out of'' the prison – without getting caught. Your mission: to engineer the biggest jailbreak in Merakai history!'' ''Good luck.'' ==Plot summary== Learning that [[The Heart of Steel]] has been captured and sent to a prison on [[Merakai]], [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[4-8C]] travels to the swamp planet with due haste. On his ship, the ''[[Zaker Besar]]'', former Captain of the ''[[M'hendosat]]'', [[Kassihm]], barters with the Grand Moff for his life. Offering to help in the retrieval of [[B-1D4]] from Merakai, the [[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] begins planning his own escape from 4-8C. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]] break into [[Merakai Prison]] through an underwater vent, and search for Wondeefor. Masquerading as an inspector, one of the Imperials makes their way through the facility, encountering abrasive [[Cooking droid/Legends|cooking droids]] and the like. With 4-8C accompanying him, he finds Wondeefor in the clutches of a [[Interrogation droid/Legends|torture droid]]. Saving Wondeefor, the Imperial provokes a prison riot, freeing [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and his [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] compatriots. The Imperials escape, despite combating guards and pursuing [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]]. On the way back to the ''Zakeer Besar'', Kassihm deactivates and dismantles 4-8C, and rescues the Rebels, offering his services. ==Appearances== {{App |characters= *[[4-8C]] *[[B-1D4]] *[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] *[[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] *[[Kassihm]] *[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] *[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] *[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] *[[Burra Stone]] |organisms= *[[Bullet beetyl]] {{1stm}} *[[Ghost spider|Ghost spydr]] {{Mo}} *[[Sea slug/Legends|Sea slug]] {{1st}} *[[Wharzog]] {{1st}} *[[Wyrm]] {{1stm}} |droids= *[[Assassin droid/Legends|Assassin droid]] **[[IG-series/Legends|IG-series]] ***[[IG-88 assassin droid/Legends|IG-88 assassin droid]] *[[Protocol droid/Legends|Protocol droid]] **[[B-1 series protocol droid]] **[[3PO-series protocol droid/Legends|3PO-series protocol droid]] |locations= *[[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] {{Mo}} *[[Merakai]] **[[Merakai Prison]] {{1st}} |organizations= *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] **[[Department of Punishment]] {{1stm}} **[[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] ***[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] **[[Imperial Department of Redesign|Imperial Redesign Team]] |species= *[[Human/Legends|Human]] *[[Khil]] *[[Nikto/Legends|Nikto]] *[[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] |vehicles= *[[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star I]] {{Mo}} *''[[Optitron]]'' {{1st}} *[[Imperial state ship]] **''[[Zaker Besar]]'' *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/ln space superiority starfighter]] *[[Water wings]] {{1st}} |miscellanea= *[[The Heart of Steel]] *[[Master Torturer]] {{Mo}}}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ScholasticMissionsNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომების მისიები 16: გაქცევა იმპერიული ციხიდან }} [[Category:Star Wars Missions books|Missions 16]]
